<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f6f6f6"/>
  <!-- Coffee cup -->
  <g transform="translate(90,260)">
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="80" rx="120" ry="40" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#c0c0c0" stroke-width="4"/>
    <path d="M0 80 h240 v40 a20 20 0 0 1 -20 20 h-200 a20 20 0 0 1 -20 -20 z" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#c0c0c0" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="70" rx="92" ry="28" fill="#3b2f2f"/>
    <path d="M240 80 a40 30 0 0 0 0 -60" fill="none" stroke="#c0c0c0" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <g fill="#7b5b3d" opacity="0.8">
      <ellipse cx="120" cy="60" rx="72" ry="18"/>
    </g>
    <path d="M90 30 q20 -30 60 0 q40 -30 60 0" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.18"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Taster face -->
  <g transform="translate(280,110)">
    <circle cx="120" cy="140" r="120" fill="#ffdfc4" stroke="#d9ab84" stroke-width="4"/>
    <!-- Eyes -->
    <path d="M70 110 q20 15 40 0" fill="none" stroke="#6b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M170 110 q20 15 40 0" fill="none" stroke="#6b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <!-- Nose -->
    <path d="M120 120 q6 20 -6 24" fill="none" stroke="#c38f66" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Mouth open with tongue -->
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="190" rx="40" ry="28" fill="#6b4b3a"/>
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="190" rx="30" ry="18" fill="#ffb3b3"/>
    <!-- Tongue details: three small dark triangles to indicate bitter taste -->
    <g fill="#3b2f2f" transform="translate(105,182)">
      <polygon points="0,10 8,0 16,10"/>
      <polygon points="24,14 32,4 40,14"/>
      <polygon points="-8,14 0,4 8,14"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Hand holding spoon near cup -->
    <path d="M200 240 q30 10 50 -10" fill="none" stroke="#ffdfc4" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <rect x="220" y="210" width="40" height="12" rx="6" fill="#bdbdbd" transform="rotate(-35 240 216)"/>
    <ellipse cx="238" cy="200" rx="14" ry="8" fill="#6b4b3a" stroke="#5a4638" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Small bitter indicator: zigzag lines near tongue -->
  <g transform="translate(340,250)">
    <path d="M0 0 l8 -12 l8 12 l8 -12 l8 12" fill="none" stroke="#3b2f2f" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
</svg>

You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }
